crime.value: Serial murders by throat slashing in residential area
crime.quote: stream of dark red blood flowed out of the gaping wound in her throat

victim.value: Edna Fisher, murdered in her bedroom; part of multiple killings
victim.quote: Sounds came to Edna Fisher in the dark bedroom

closed_world.value: Garwood Village residential area in Nautilus Beach, New Jersey
closed_world.quote: those living in Garwood Village that he couldn't hit again

resolution.value: Investigation appears successful as Wallace is later married and on honeymoon
resolution.quote: From now on you have to share everything with me

investigator.value: Captain Wallace, police detective leading the investigation
investigator.quote: Wallace answered. Progress? Maybe. We know the killer is a man. We know his blood type.

clue_fairness.value: Blood type and personality profile clues shared with reader through investigator dialogue
clue_fairness.quote: We know the killer is a man. We know his blood type. Little by little we're putting together a personality profile

social_world.value: Police hierarchy with commissioner, captain, and press relations creating institutional pressure and accountability
social_world.quote: One, remove me from the case. Stiles can command the squad. At the same time you can satisfy the Press

media_and_audience.value: Press controls narrative and creates public pressure on police investigation through exclusive reporter relationship
media_and_audience.quote: The trick commissioner is not to let them control the conversation... baffling them with bullshit

investigator_wound.value: Captain Wallace's professional vulnerability exposed by serial killer's ability to evade his security measures
investigator_wound.quote: Then, the son of a bitch got through and killed once more

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton garwood village
